summary: GCA wallet-warning evidence is centralized here for wallet security vendors, DEX interfaces, reviewers, and community moderators. It records the Blockaid report, owner-observed wallet UI state, contract facts, current official market route, historical functional swap evidence, and public claim boundaries.

blockaidReport.followUpSubmissionResult: Blockaid support portal returned HTTP 200 OK
blockaidReport.nextAction: Keep monitoring wallet and DEX warning UI; do not claim security-vendor approval or permanent warning-free status unless a vendor confirms it.
blockaidReport.ownerObservationResult: No wallet risk warning was visible in the tested wallet/DEX flow.

historicalFunctionalSwapEvidence.scope: These transactions support only a narrow functional claim that small Base Mainnet DEX buys and sells were observed. They are not current official market links and do not prove mature liquidity, organic demand, audit completion, listing acceptance, or security-vendor approval.

safeClaims: A Blockaid false-positive report was submitted on 2026-05-10 and a follow-up with current GCA/USDT links and buy/sell evidence was submitted on 2026-05-13.
Owner reported on 2026-05-14 that no wallet risk warning was visible in the tested wallet/DEX flow.
This is an owner-visible UI observation only, not a permanent security-vendor approval or cross-wallet guarantee.
GCA has fixed total supply and no post-deployment mint function.
The official public market route is the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool.
Historical small buy and sell transactions were observed on Base Mainnet.
No third-party audit has been completed.
doNotClaim: security-vendor approval, permanent warning-free status, or cross-wallet warning removal before vendor/current wallet UI confirms it
security-vendor approval before the vendor confirms it
third-party audit completion before an independent report is published
CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap listing before publication
deep liquidity, price support, or return promises

nextActions: Use this page and JSON if Blockaid or a wallet-security reviewer asks for more evidence.
Keep the official GCA/USDT market route live and consistent.
Do not send repeated duplicate reports unless Blockaid or a wallet provider asks for more information.
Recheck wallet UI periodically before making any future warning-status update.

ownerObservation.scope: This is an owner-visible UI observation only, not a permanent security-vendor approval or cross-wallet guarantee.
